messages.body: Hello Cherry!Your subscription has been canceled.
Hello, I’m not sure why we’re still getting notifications? We have canceled this service?

Hello Cherry! Merry Christmas!🎄🎁  Wishing you a joyous holiday season filled with love, laughter, and all the things that bring you happiness.   Thank you for your trust and support throughout the year. It’s been a pleas…
You’re welcome!
Thank you
Hello Cherry,  Hope you’re doing well!  We refunded $249 back to your account.

Subject: Re: hi\n\nBody: Hi Cherry, I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to reach out personally to address the challenges you've experienced with our team. I understand your frustrations, and I sincerely apologi…

I’ll be reporting you to the Better Business Bureau as well as giving you multiple bad reviews
I’ve been very kind not to give you a bad review, but I’m about to do that now
I’m incredibly frustrated with everything to do with your service.

I was told it was very easy to cancel. All I need to do was send you a message and 30 days later I would be canceled but instead you’re giving me the runaround you’re not canceling my service and you are charging me!
I really apologise for the inconvenience. When I spoke to you the other day, the invoice was already generated. I did try my level best to stop the payment from going through but wasn’t possible.
Hello Cherry,   Sure. I’m getting the amount refunded back to you. I’ve informed the finance team already.
This is an unacceptable business practice
As I stated on November 15. We want to cancel the service and I want my money returned now.
We’ve cancelled your account and the refund will be credited back to your account in 5-6 business days. You should expect it to hit your account by Thursday.
I am too busy for a phone call
My account is now overdrawn and I have bank fees because you took out that charge and it was unauthorized!
I have emailed I have texted in writing multiple times. This is Cherry Johnston. My service should’ve been canceled as of December 15.
You stole $250 from me! Please return it immediately!
I am furious. I still don’t have my money back? And the service is still not been canceled?

Hello Cherry,  I’m extremely sorry about this. I was unavailable as I was sick :(  I’m back to work today, and I’m here to help you out with whatever you need. Please just text me here once you’re available for a quick c…
No interest ans no time for a phone call.
I have mo interest. Return my funds immediately and cancel service.

Subject: Re: A reminder for our upcoming meeting\n\nBody: I never received this call? Also, I don’t really want to take a call right now. I just want to cancel your service. I canceled it in writing on November 15 and I …
This service should be canceled as of today as requested November 15th. It has not been effective for us. ￼
I asked to cancel the service back on November 15.
Hey Cherry,  Can we please get on a call now so I can help you out?
Sure
Hey Cherry,  It was lovely speaking with you!   Here is the link to our meeting tomorrow at 1:30 PM - http://meet.google.com/wnn-bwke-swx   Looking forward to connecting with you :)
I do not want a meeting with anyone. I want you to cancel the service.

I am furious! I canceled my service. I confirmed that I would not be charged today and then I got charged! I don’t have enough money to cover this in my account! And I am very upset!! you assured me today that I would no…

We are writing to confirm that I am looking into your account immediately. I am incredibly sorry for the billing error and the inconvenience this has caused you today. We are prioritizing your refund request to ensure th…
Hey Cherry,  As discussed, please do text me here when you’re available for a quick call.
Anytime as per your convenience would work, not more than 10-15 mins
I can chat in about 15 minutes
Hello Cherry,  What time are you free today for a call?
I’m sorry my time is very limited.
Hello Cherry,  Hope you’re doing well :)  I’ve been wanting to speak to you. Can you please let me know your availability?
I sent a message back in November that we are canceling as of December 15.
I’ve been wanting to speak with you
Hello Cherry,  Can I give you a call now?
Hello Cherry,  Hope you’re doing well! :)  Just checking in to see how things are going at your end. I didn’t hear back from you yet.

Hello Cherry,  Happy Thanksgiving, hope you’re having a great day ♥️  Please let me know your available availability for a quick call. I’d love to discuss your concerns and figure out how to proceed further.   Looking fo…
Apologies for the delay in response.  It would be ideal if we can connect over a call by the end of this week.   Pls let us know, if Thursday works for you
I want to cancel this service as of 12/15/2025
Google posts go out everyday!
Hey Cherry,  Hope you’re doing well :)  Apologies for the delayed response. I was unavailable yesterday.  Posts are going up everyday. You can also track them through the Zoca app.
Also, when we get leads, I have no idea whether they have booked or not and what the conversation was with them? Or whether they just visited our site? I wish this was obvious?
Understood! Let me give you a call in a while and explain it to you. That would be better!
It looks like they don’t go out unless I send them out?
Not seeing a ton of results
I have not seen any posts???
I still don’t think we’re getting a ton of clients from Zoca. We also need more Google advertising for our classes. Maybe you can help us with that?
Yes I understand! Local SEO is a tedious process. Let’s keep working in reviews
Hello Cherry,  Hope you’re doing well :)  Just checking in to see how things are going at your end!
I did inform the team about Google posts earlier, however I’ve reminded them again. Will get this done for you 👍🏼
We’ve seen a good increase in your profile clicks for October which is a sign that the optimisation is working well
Amazing work on reviews by the way 🔥
Sorry, I can’t talk right now.
No worries! This is Monisha from Zoca. Please get back to me on the Zoca appchat when you’re free!
Hello, you have reached Sherry Johnson with 72Sold Realty. Please leave a message or shoot me a text for a faster response. Have a great day.
Thx!
Hello Cherry!  I’m back to work today, hope you’re doing well :)   Sure, I’ll ask the team to start Google posts around this!

Can you help us advertise our classes?  ￼  🌵✨ Attention Gilbert Cosmetologists! ✨🌵 Fall classes are HERE and they’re filling up fast! 🍁 Join our small, hands-on classes designed to elevate your skills and expand your ser…

Hi, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major Indian festival, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be able to schedule m…
What does this mean? Did they book on my gloss genius or just come to your website and inquire??  Also i have to update status manually?
Yes, you’ll have to update status manually
Hello Cherry,  Hope you’re doing well!   You get the above notification when anyone comes on to your website, enter their information and clicks on “book now”
